title: Eastern Style Chicken Kebabs
description: Tender chicken marinated in a blend of spices and grilled to perfection, served with a side of fresh vegetables.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the chicken and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
